titles.title: He Is My Reason for Living

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is my reason for living Oh He is the king of all kings I long to be His possession Oh, He is my everything

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I remember my days of darkness Without sunshine or sight to lead my way But a whisper of His voice softly calling To the arms of my Maker to stay

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is my reason for living Oh, He is the king of all kings I long to be His possession Oh, He is my everything

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: After the lighting and thunder After the last bell has rung I want to bow down…
